mapper.insert: INSERT INTO follows (user_id, team_id, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{teamId}, #{createdAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM follows WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND team_id = #{teamId}
mapper.select: SELECT team_id FROM follows WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, user_id AS userId, team_id AS teamId, created_at AS createdAt FROM follows WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND team_id = #{teamId} LIMIT 1
